creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Tue Mar 25 18:46:31 2014
New Revision: 349169
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349169
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349169/

Log:
  - Update to 1.4.1
  - Convert USE_ZIP to USES=zip
  - Support staging
  
  PR:		ports/187406
  Submitted by:	Naram Qashat <cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout

Modified:
  head/sysutils/jdiskreport/Makefile
  head/sysutils/jdiskreport/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/jdiskreport/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/jdiskreport/Makefile	Tue Mar 25 18:40:44 2014	(r349168)
+++ head/sysutils/jdiskreport/Makefile	Tue Mar 25 18:46:31 2014	(r349169)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	jdiskreport
-PORTVERSION=	1.4.0
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils java
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.jGoodies.com/download/${PORTNAME}/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION:S,.,_,g}
@@ -23,9 +22,8 @@ JAVAVM?=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/java
 JDISKDIR?=	${PREFIX}/lib/jdiskreport
 
 DESKTOP_ENTRIES="JDiskReport" "${COMMENT}" "" "jdiskreport" \
-		"System;Filesystem;" "false"
+		"System;Filesystem;" false
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 do-build:
 	@cd ${WRKDIR}
 	@${SED} -e 's,%%JDISKDIR%%,${JDISKDIR},g' \
@@ -34,8 +32,9 @@ do-build:
 		> ${WRKDIR}/jdiskreport
 
 do-install:
-	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/jdiskreport ${PREFIX}/bin
-	-@${MKDIR} ${JDISKDIR}
-	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}/jdiskreport-${PORTVERSION}.jar ${JDISKDIR}
+	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/jdiskreport ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	-@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${JDISKDIR}
+	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC:S|_|.|g}/jdiskreport-${PORTVERSION}.jar \
+		${STAGEDIR}${JDISKDIR}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/sysutils/jdiskreport/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/jdiskreport/distinfo	Tue Mar 25 18:40:44 2014	(r349168)
+++ head/sysutils/jdiskreport/distinfo	Tue Mar 25 18:46:31 2014	(r349169)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (jdiskreport-1_4_0.zip) = 6d92afaf201e094c0413cc6b62926bda29879fc79f92a4bea73ca10b1019a44f
-SIZE (jdiskreport-1_4_0.zip) = 757544
+SHA256 (jdiskreport-1_4_1.zip) = a834d3b50bcba0711caff7284103c16025c03057ea6ebfc34a3ac1a5f9fcb534
+SIZE (jdiskreport-1_4_1.zip) = 864613
